title: Cannabis licensing application: Research licence - Canada.ca
content:
## Cannabis licensing application: Research licence

### Non-therapeutic research on cannabis (NTRC)
- Application form for a research licence to authorize activities in relation to non-therapeutic research on cannabis (NTRC)
- Abridged protocol template for non-therapeutic research on cannabis (NTRC) Category 1 studies
- Full protocol template for non-therapeutic research on cannabis (NTRC) Category 2 and 3 studies
- Cannabis research and evidence dossier (CRED) template for non-therapeutic research on cannabis (NTRC)
- Cannabis information form (CIF) for non-therapeutic research on cannabis (NTRC)
- Non-therapeutic research on cannabis (NTRC) Category 1 checklist

### Cannabis research licences
- Research protocol for project-based research licence applications (single or multiple site) (suggested template)
- Research protocol for institution-wide research licence applications for multiple projects at a single site (suggested template)
- Institution-wide research licence site attestation
- Institution-wide research licence responsible person attestation
- Record keeping attestation
- Applying for a research licence checklist
